Build a play habit
your cat will love

Cats are natural hunters — they need daily play to stay happy and out of trouble. Happy Cat helps you build a simple, guilt-free routine that sticks.

Explore features Get support

See it in action

Why Happy Cat

Your cat needs the hunt. Every single day.

Research shows that just 10–15 minutes of daily interactive play reduces cat anxiety, prevents obesity, and stops unwanted behaviours like furniture scratching and midnight zoomies. But life gets busy — and guilt creeps in.

Happy Cat makes it effortless. Set a goal, get reminded, hit start, done. Over time your cat will start coming to you for play — and you won't need the app anymore.

Everything you need

Built for real cat owners,
not fanatics

🔔

Smart Reminders

Get notified when it's playtime — and again if life gets in the way. A gentle nudge that keeps your cat from being forgotten.

⏱️

Play Timer

Counts down your session right on screen, as a Live Activity on your lock screen, and on your Apple Watch. No excuses to stop early.

🔥

Play Streak

Build a streak of consecutive play days. Streaks are addictive — once you see that number climbing, missing a day feels wrong.

📊

Activity History

See all your past play sessions, total time invested, your best streak, and your favourite play day. Your dedication, measured.

✨

Daily Activity Tips

Unlock a new cat toy idea every day — made from household items like toilet rolls, straws, and foil. Keep playtime fresh and free.

🐱

Cat Profile

Add your cat's photo, name, age and sex. Because every great habit deserves a face to play for.

Simple by design

Four steps to a happier cat

1

Set your goal

Choose how many sessions per day and how long each one should be. Even 5 minutes counts.

2

Get reminded

Happy Cat notifies you at the right time — and follows up if you haven't played yet.

3

Hit play

Start the timer, grab that wand toy, and let your cat unleash its inner predator.

4

Build the streak

Watch your streak grow. After a few weeks, your cat will come to get you — habit formed.

Also on Apple Watch

Keep track without touching your phone

The Happy Cat Apple Watch app shows the remaining play time right on your wrist, so you can stay fully in the moment with your cat. When the session ends, your watch celebrates too.

Common questions

Everything you might
want to know

I opened the verification email but the app is stuck — what do I do?

You must open the verification link on the same device where you registered. The link opens your browser first — tap "Open in Happy Cat" when prompted. If you're still stuck, request a new verification inside the app. Still having trouble? Email us at support@happycatapp.net

How do I get the Apple Watch app?

It downloads automatically alongside the iPhone app. Find it in your Apple Watch app list and open it during a play session to follow your remaining play time right on your wrist.

I'm not receiving any notifications — what's wrong?

First, check inside Happy Cat that your reminders are switched on in Settings. If they're enabled there, head to your iPhone's Settings → Apps → Happy Cat and make sure notification permissions are granted.

Can I change my cat's name, age, sex, or photo?

You can update your cat's photo by tapping it on the home screen. For name, age, or sex changes, drop us a line at support@happycatapp.net and we'll get that sorted for you.

Is there an Android version?

Not yet — Happy Cat is currently iPhone only. Android support is on the roadmap. Follow us to hear when it arrives.

How long should I play with my cat each day?

Cat behaviour experts recommend 15–30 minutes of interactive play per day, split into shorter sessions. If you're just starting out, one 10-minute session daily is a great habit to build. You can adjust your goals anytime in Settings.

We're here for you

Still need help?

Can't find what you're looking for in the FAQ? Our support team is happy to help — usually within one business day.
